chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI High Court Appeal No.238 of 2024 Shikarpur Power Pvt. Ltd and others Versus Federation of Pakistan and others. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S). Hearing (Priority) Case 1. For order on CMA No.1674/2024 (U/A). 2. For order on CMA No.1675/2024 (U/O-23 R-1). 3. For order on CMA No.1427/2024. 4. For order on CMA No.1428/2024. 5. For order on office objection a/w reply as at “A”. 6. For hearing of main case. 7. For hearing of CMA No.1389/2024 (stay)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 19.08.2024 Mr. Muhammad Aizaz Ahmed, Advocate for the petitioners. M/s Ijaz Ahmed and Hashmatullah Aleem, advocates for respondent No.3..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. 1). Urgency granted. 2). This appeal is pending adjudication in respect of an order dated 10.06.2024, which is impugned. Notices were issued, however, today counsels have appeared and the petitioner’s counsel has requested for the withdrawal of this appeal unconditionally. On the count of unconditional withdrawal only Mr. Ijaz Ahmed has no objection. The Appeal is dismissed as not pressed along with pending applications. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Ayaz Gul
